www.title: Coolha
www.subtitle1: Digital growth momentum, empowering creators, brands, communities, and organizations
www.description: A decentralized application developed on the blockchain

aios.ai_rise_desc: With the rapid improvement of artificial intelligence capabilities, more and more tasks are being completed by AI systems, and AI is gradually becoming a core executor in the digital world.
aios.new_work_model_title: Coolha is researching and building a new work model:
aios.one_person_one_company: One Person + One Web3 AI System = One Company
aios.model_desc: In this model, a creator, developer, or entrepreneur can complete work that previously required team collaboration through AI agents and automated systems.
aios.empower_individual: Empowering individuals with capabilities previously only available to teams
aios.past_startup_desc: Running a company usually meant constantly expanding team size.
aios.ai_startup_desc: Running a company may mean building smarter systems.
aios.conclusion_desc: Through AI agents, automated processes, and Web3 infrastructure, one person can build, operate, and scale a digital company.

company.title: Coolha Limited
company.subtitle: Making data information ownable, trustworthy, and valuable
company.description0: A software technology company focused on Web3 technology development and applications, established in Hong Kong on August 26, 2025.
company.description1: We hope to change production relations through technology, contribute to world civilization progress, and make the world a better place
company.description2: We believe that the development of Web3 and blockchain is not just technological and internet progress, but also a positive concept that can extend to various fields
company.description3: Public blockchain is an important technology for world unity, global solidarity, democratic governance, and solving trust issues
company.mission_desc: To promote internet progress and world civilization advancement, create exciting products and services, and make the world better
company.vision_desc: Making data information ownable, trustworthy, and valuable
company.values_desc: Always user-centered, avoiding excessive commercialization and financialization, ensuring fair rights for all
company.innovation_desc: Committed to continuously exploring and applying cutting-edge technologies to provide better Web3 products and service solutions.
company.development_desc: DAPP, frontend websites, EVM smart contracts Solidity, UI/UX design, product architecture, blockchain application technology
company.market_desc: Market research reports, data analysis, technical research articles, etc.
company.marketing_desc: Advertising traffic, NFT marketing solutions and other technologies, providing revenue solutions for creators and enterprises
company.planning_desc: Web3 business model research, providing market research, marketing planning, content creativity, brand planning, corporate image design, etc.
company.digital_marketing_desc: Issuing digital assets based on blockchain technology to enhance brand loyalty and create unique value, establishing closer connections between users and brands
company.web3_application_desc: Dapp development, on-chain smart contract development, web3 project websites. Custom development based on business scenario requirements
company.exposure_growth_desc: Platform vertical advertising, precision marketing. Brand research and content planning to enhance consumer and fan engagement.
company.brand_building_desc: Planning brand activities, brand promotion strategies, brand image design

dashboard.version_notice: Coolha is currently in v0.1-alpha version. We are working hard on development, please stay tuned.

rwa.hero_desc: RWA (Real World Assets) tokenization brings liquidity, transparency, and global accessibility to traditional assets on the blockchain.
rwa.what_is_rwa_desc1: RWA (Real World Assets) refers to tangible or intangible assets that exist in the physical world, such as real estate, artwork, treasury bonds, commodities, or even carbon credits.
rwa.what_is_rwa_desc2: Through blockchain technology, we convert the ownership or yield rights of these assets into digital tokens (Tokenization). This not only breaks the geographical and financial threshold limits of traditional financial markets but also greatly improves asset trading efficiency.
rwa.physical_assets_desc: Real estate, infrastructure, commodities, and other physical assets
rwa.financial_assets_desc: Treasury bonds, stocks, private equity, invoice financing
rwa.core_advantages_subtitle: Reshaping asset circulation, unlocking trillion-dollar market potential
rwa.adv_liquidity_desc: Through fractionalization, high-threshold assets are split so that global retail investors can participate, greatly increasing the turnover rate of illiquid assets.
rwa.adv_trust_desc: Blockchain ledgers are immutable, and smart contracts automatically execute yield distribution. From asset confirmation to trade settlement, the entire process is traceable on-chain, reducing trust costs.
rwa.adv_friction_desc: Eliminate multi-layer intermediaries in traditional finance (brokers, clearinghouses, etc.) to achieve peer-to-peer (P2P) instant settlement, significantly reducing trading fees and time costs.
rwa.future_desc: RWA is considered the core engine driving the next wave of Web3 growth. Coolha is committed to building a secure, compliant RWA infrastructure, connecting traditional financial institutions with decentralized networks, and bringing new life to more real-world assets on-chain.
